scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply sound-connect-db --remote --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply sound-connect-db --local --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.deploy: wrangler deploy --env production --minify src/server.ts --outdir dist --upload-source-maps --var SENTRY_RELEASE:$(sentry-cli releases propose-version)
scripts.sentry:sourcemaps: _SENTRY_RELEASE=$(sentry-cli releases propose-version) && sentry-cli releases new $_SENTRY_RELEASE --org=szyman-corp --project=sound-connect-api && sentry-cli sourcemaps upload --org=szyman-corp --project=sound-connect-api --release=$_SENTRY_RELEASE --strip-prefix 'dist/..' dist
